examples: Other boys saw it and began to laugh; then they all copied the first; and they ran round Philip, limping comically, screaming with shrill laughter.
He began comically ad-libbing a script.
In fact our admiration for the comically gifted is relatively new and not very well-founded, says Rod Martin, a psychologist at the University of Western Ontario.
One of them staggered around comically as I warmed a glass of the drink in my hands.
The problem with so much gear, however, was that our packs had grown comically large.
